title: JITServe — SLO-aware Serving with Imprecise Information
summary_zh: 首個明確處理三類 SLO（延遲敏感、截止時間敏感、複合）混合工作負載的 LLM 服務系統（UIUC、Cisco、Google）。以 service goodput 取代聚合延遲/吞吐量，並證明既有策略（FCFS、SJF、LAS、EDF）競爭比皆無界。QRF 上界預測+pattern-graph matching提供即時精確化資訊；GMAX 演算法對活躍請求保留最低頻寬、把剩餘容量分給邊際 goodput 最高者，並按輸入長度組批以維持 kernel 效率。對複合（agentic）請求給出第一等公民的處理。1.4–6.3× goodput、28.5–83.2% 資源節省，貼近真實長度神諭。
summary_en: First LLM serving system to explicitly handle workloads mixing three SLO classes — latency-sensitive, deadline-sensitive, compound (UIUC, Cisco, Google). Replaces aggregate latency/throughput with service goodput and proves existing policies (FCFS, SJF, LAS, EDF) all have unbounded competitive ratio. A QRF upper-bound predictor + pattern-graph matching deliver just-in-time refined information; the GMAX algorithm reserves minimum bandwidth per active request, allocates surplus by marginal goodput, and groups requests by input length for kernel efficiency. First scheduler to give compound (agentic) requests first-class treatment. 1.4–6.3× goodput, 28.5–83.2% resource savings, near-oracle behaviour.
